context.normalization_rules: Remove dynamic parts from error messages to identify patterns: - Line numbers (:42:10 → :X:X) - File paths (/path/to/file.ts → <file>) - UUIDs (abc123-... → <uuid>) - Timestamps (ISO format → <timestamp>) - Numeric IDs (id=123 → id=<id>) - Hex hashes (32+ chars → <hash>) - Timeout values (30000ms → <ms>ms)

objective.goal: Normalize error messages to identify patterns
Display top error patterns in dashboard

success_criteria.criterion: Same errors produce same pattern hash
Pattern count increments on new occurrences
Empty state shows when no patterns

endpoint.description: Get error pattern summary and top patterns
Get error pattern details with affected tests

testing_checklist.test: Same errors produce same pattern hash
Pattern count increments on new occurrences
Empty state shows when no patterns
